headline: AI Is Driving the Market: J.P. Morgan Picks 2 Stocks With Direct Exposure
summary: Amid ongoing macro uncertainty, Joyce Chang, Chair of Global Research at JPMorgan, says a more persistent force is shaping the market – AI.
